title: Euthanase livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Euthanase livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for euthanasia

pcs.text: Confirm criteria for decision to destroy livestock according to workplace procedures and seek approval of supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm criteria for decision to destroy livestock according to workplace procedures and seek approval of supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm criteria for decision to destroy livestock according to workplace procedures and seek approval of supervisor.

pcs.text: Confirm the method selected to destroy livestock is suitable for the species according to animal welfare and codes of practice requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the method selected to destroy livestock is suitable for the species according to animal welfare and codes of practice requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the method selected to destroy livestock is suitable for the species according to animal welfare and codes of practice requirements.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Select, check and prepare equipment and materials required to complete the euthanasia
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and prepare equipment and materials required to complete the euthanasia?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and prepare equipment and materials required to complete the euthanasia.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and public safety risks associated with the euthanasia
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and public safety risks associated with the euthanasia?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and public safety risks associated with the euthanasia.

pcs.text: Obtain licences and permits required to complete euthanasia where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain licences and permits required to complete euthanasia where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain licences and permits required to complete euthanasia where necessary.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for euthanasia

elements.title: Carry out euthanasia of animal

pcs.text: Handle and transport equipment appropriately and safely
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle and transport equipment appropriately and safely?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle and transport equipment appropriately and safely.

pcs.text: Handle and restrain animal using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle and restrain animal using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle and restrain animal using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Euthanase animal in a quick and painless way
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Euthanase animal in a quick and painless way?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Euthanase animal in a quick and painless way.

pcs.text: Check animal to ensure it is dead
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check animal to ensure it is dead?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check animal to ensure it is dead.

pcs.text: Destroy animals that have not been euthanased immediately, in a humane manner according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Destroy animals that have not been euthanased immediately, in a humane manner according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Destroy animals that have not been euthanased immediately, in a humane manner according to animal welfare practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out euthanasia of animal

elements.title: Carry out post-euthanasia procedures

pcs.text: Handle and prepare carcass to be used for research or commercial purposes according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle and prepare carcass to be used for research or commercial purposes according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle and prepare carcass to be used for research or commercial purposes according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Dispose of carcass not to be used for research or commercial purposes according to legislative and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of carcass not to be used for research or commercial purposes according to legislative and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of carcass not to be used for research or commercial purposes according to legislative and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Clean and store equipment, materials and PPE according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and store equipment, materials and PPE according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store equipment, materials and PPE according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report unserviceable equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record and report animal and euthanasia details according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report animal and euthanasia details according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report animal and euthanasia details according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out post-euthanasia procedures

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
